title: Canada Revenue Agency Departmental Performance Report 2013-14 - Canada.ca
content:

v. Governor in Council Appointments, www.appointments-nominations.gc.ca/

vii. Canada Revenue Agency Departmental Performance Report Supplementary Information tables, www.cra-arc.gc.ca/gncy/rprts/menu-eng.html

xi. Canada Revenue Agency Twitter, www.twitter.com/canrevagency
